betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Modular Storage: Powercell (High)§f

§aUnlock the ultimate late-game RF buffer with the top-tier modular Powercell!§f

The §9Powercell (High)§f is the third and highest tier of the RFTools Power energy storage network. Storing immense amounts of power, it is built to buffer the output of major reactors and distribute massive energy currents to late-game manufacturing processes.

§6Powercell Specifications§f:
§b• Storage Capacity§f: Holds up to §e20,000,000 RF§f of internal energy buffer (5× more than Medium, 40× more than Low).
§b• Transfer Capacity§f: Limits energy transfer to §c4,000 RF/tick§f per side under default conditions.
§b• Network Scaling§f: Integrates into your modular network (up to §c729 blocks§f). Every additional block in the network increases the maximum side transfer rate by a factor of §a+0.25× (25%)§f!
§b• NBT Preservation§f: When broken, the block §aretains all stored energy§f, allowing safe relocation without losing power.

§6Upgrading & Configuration§f:
§b• Side I/O Mode§f: §9Right-click§f a face with a §9wrench§f or §9Smart Wrench§f to toggle between §bInput§f (blue), §cOutput§f (orange), and §7Disabled§f (none).
§b• Upgrade Continuity§f: Crafted in a §6Copy NBT recipe§f. If your §bPowercell (Medium)§f used in the upgrade contains RF, §a100% of that energy is preserved§f in the resulting High cell!
§b• Wireless Linking§f: Install a §bPowercell Card§f inside the slot to wirelessly link this cell's storage buffer to other cells across distances or dimensions.

§6Crafting§f:
§eCrafted by surrounding a §bPowercell (Medium)§f in the center with §b4× Power Core (High)§f in cardinal directions, and §b4× Redstone§f in the corners.

§eTip§f: A single 9×9×9 Powercell (High) network can sustain transfer rates exceeding §e4,000 × 729 × 0.25 ≈ 729,000 RF/tick§f per side — enough to feed any HBM reactor directly.
